commit_message: Try to fully drain the pending list when the transport requests a refill -
Fixes for idle transport tracking -
Added assert that we are not doing blocking calls from a dispatch queue  also dispatch the result of an async request on the original dispatch queue on which the request was made on -
fixed build
Small improvements in case of non standard setup
Make sure we destroy all zk clients
Fix a problem with deployment agent when updating bundles
Enhance agent to support other urls protocols
Let count be configurable in batch sender so different wacky combinations of batch/count can be used
Minor improvements in jmx domains synchronization -  Fixed removal of domain -
adding fabric-activemq feature  fixing scala-repo problem for agents
[FABRIC-15] Add support for updating etc/config - properties and etc/system - properties
made the sample a little simpler
refactored the fabric manifest entry names to be a little neater

commit_message: Make sure unregistered fabs get registered as they get deployed -
Avoid resolving the test scope dependences -
Also auto install bundle transitive deps -
Fix compile error -
Update some more versions embedded in the code
Fix a couple matching gotchas with importing  make -d on import only apply to matched paths  make -d not applicable when importing a properties file
added bundle version
added more useful exception error message so its easier to deduce which dependency brings in an unresolvable dependency
temporary hack to fix fab:start - ideally we need to wait for dependent bundles to start first (within some time window I guess) before trying to start the fab
temporary hack to fix fab:start - ideally we need to wait for dependent bundles to start first (within some time window I guess) before trying to start the fab
Dont think its really necessary to delete these keys first
Add the FuseSource maven repo to fabric-maven-proxy since fabric-core-ssh-agent is using a FuseSource karaf build -   Also add some additional logging to help troubleshoot problems -
use proper URL
Add the local repo to the list of remote repositories so artifacts can be located there too
Add some logging  also only apply config updates introduced in commit ed695d6edd0c9f06f5e2 if the fabric - profiles property is set  otherwise messes up creating the initial cluster
dont start or hide bundle fragments
Support an --overwrite command so that zk:create can be used to create or update an entry -
in the case of --features  --bundles  or --repositories  the edit-profile command  can now omit the key= part  an automatic key will be used based on the value -
zk backing engine - properly delete users
trim role names
Fix imports -
temporarly fix password preffix/suffix problem
Add easy method to find what agents are associated with a profile
fix installer script problems - wait for zk client to connect
Fix typo in method names
Updated unit tests
Added getProfile() to Profile - java
Made Import - java properties protected to use in tests that import ZK setup
Added support for system property cluster - auto - start that will automatically start a zookeeper cluster  when set -
Fixed some issues with the way that artifact url is calculated in the AgentProviderUtils -
Look for existing fabric-configadmin bundle before trying to install it so FabricClusterServiceImpl can work in pojosr too
enabled things like camel-blueprint to be automatically installed - with an overly aggressive detection; lets turn down the hack when we use the BlueprintAnalyser with bnd
Added support for passing username & password to the child URI -
adding provision result/exception to the api and shell command
Fixed ProfileOverlay supplement calls
upgraded jackson and used a better default JSON serialization
added better help to the commands
Cleanup the output of integration tests  so that its more visible of what the state of the test is -  Added after test method that cleans up created agents -
Upgradd to Hadoop 1 - 0 - 0 release -
deal with possible whitespace in the parent profile names (often caused by newlines when exporting/importing to/from files to/from ZK)
Aligned tests with scripts -
handle missing JMX details a little more gracefully
[FABRICPRV-60] Modified import/export commands to handle profile parents as part of the agent properites -
Renamed property CLUSTER_AUTOSTART to ENSEMBLE_AUTOSTART -
[FABRICPRV-76] Added verbose output support for container-list which includes jmx and ssh urls -
ZookeeperConfigAdminBridge will handle multiple zookeeper managed services -
Temporarily removed framework from default profile -
FABRIC-74: container-list is sorted by container id
FABRICPRV-100: Better error message if creating fabric when already exists -
cluster-list uses  -  to represent current cluster if you use cluster-list fusemq/default
Misc fixes -
add containerName to the log events
Updated to pax-exam-karaf 0 - 5 - 1 -  Misc test improvements -
Tuned pax-exam bundles start-level to avoid the probe not started issue -
Integration test improvements -
FAB-19: Dont navigate transitive dependencies for provided dependencies that are preinstalled
Minor fix in esb profile long test -
Added logging for framework errors that can occur while the deployment agent refreshes bundles -
[FABRICPRV-147] Add an api to easily identify if a container is part of the zookeeper ensemble
[FABRICPRV-163] fabric-jaas bundle is now installed when creating/joining ensemble -
[FABRICPRV-166] Name is properlly generated when creating multiple remote nodes -
[ENTMQ-15] Replaced call to ConfigurationAdmin - getConfiguration with listConfigurations to avoid binding pid to bundles -
[FABRICPRV-171] profile-edit now uses a / delimeter to separate pids with keys -
Integration tests now add the fusesource milestone repo to the default profile before running -
Zk client now notifies the added listener instead of all when a new listener is registered -  Karaf container registration is using a lock instead of a semaphore -
Fixed startlevel for tests -

commit_message: Modified output of create commands to display additional information contained in the create metadata -
[FABRICPRV-186] Container now has a property which states if its a managed container or not -  Commands aligned to use the managed property -
[ENTESB-46] Profile display command now also displays system properties  config properties and agent properties if they are present in the profile -
itest mq - fixing jmx problem
[FABRICPRV-213] Fixed a possible NoNode exception when a node with substitute data doesnt exists -
Fixed ssh container creation and ensemble-add  which were broken after the introduction of resolvers -

commit_message: [FABRICPRV-225] ssh options now properly return default port  if none is specified directly or as part of the provider url -
[FABRICPRV-193] Windows realted fixes on fabric-agent and fabric-maven-proxy -
Make sure the agent can update itself
Changed default ssh container provider retries to 1  for faling fast unless explicitly specified -
[FABRICPRV-233] Fixed the display of container-list to properly display children and local container -
added a helper method getMavenRepoUploadURI() we can use from tools such as IDE to know where to deploy to for a fabric
Deployment agent now sorts the fabric maven proxies in the same manner that that the fabric service does -
Fixed NPE when uninstalling the fabric-maven-proxy bundle -
Added a sleep period in example camel profile itest  so that we give time to some exchanges to complete before the assertion -
FABRICPRV-231 polish the cxf demo for integration test

commit_message: Fix ZooKeeper / ConfigAdmin bridge to allow substitution of osgi and system properties
Fix ZooKeeper / ConfigAdmin bridge to allow substitution of osgi and system properties
make sure we have system bundles checksums when starting an agent
make sure we have system bundles checksums when starting an agent
[FABRICPRV-292] The provisioning results should contain the list of all artifacts deployed
Added @Ignore to most tests in EsbFeaturesTest as they have been failing or causing the build to hang
Added @Ignore to failing tests
[FABRIC-119] Ignoring individual proxy resolution issues -  The deployment agent will ignore them and try to use only those that were properly resolved -
FABRIC-120] Import utils now check for null or empty strings before adding a parent to a profile -

[FABRIC-118] Cloud provider commands will treat managed and not managed containers the same -  Add command now adds a fabric pid to the configuration to avoid dublicates -  Cloud provider remove will also remove them pid -
[FABRIC-202] Aligned itests with recent changes in fabric:create and fabric:join -
[FABRIC-202] Aligned itests with recent changes in fabric:create and fabric:join -
Fix eca-core build which is broken with latest camel snapshots
Reenabled some of the tests that were marked as ignored -
added an isEmpty() helper method so tooling can decide if a requirement is worth deleting
provide a neater syntax for installing custom processes: process:install -k kindOfThing URL
sort the installed processes by id
[FABRIC-240] Fixed self update test to properly upgrade container versions -  Test now uses perfectus versions -
Fixed environment variable updates  changed configUrl to controllerUrl in service factory
[ENTMQ-79] mq-create problem when parent container isnt called root + fixed some problems with used ports detection
Minor improvement to configure hostnames script -

commit_message: removed old endpointUri configuration on PolicySet
[FABRIC-244] Fix overrides support in profile-edit command
avoid possible NPE on restart
Delete and stop commands will prevent the user from deleting/stopping ensemble server container  unless the force option is used -
ContainerImpl now substitutes placeholders for addresses and resolver -
Fix ContainerImplTest failure
setMetadata on ContainerImpl will now save the metadata to the registry -  Child container provider will now properlly create template from using the jmx credentials found in the container metadata -
Aligned some integration tests with recent security changes -
[FABRIC-308] The agent downloads jars that are already present in the system folder
ZooKeeperConfigAdminBridge will return empty String if placeholder substitution fails -
[ENTMQ-134] - align mq-create command with new security policies
[ENTESB-425] ensure fab MavenResolverImpl can honor new @id postfix
Lazily load repos and features to avoid exceptions when the zookeeper ensemble is recreated
fabric:create now adopts a convention to use the new users password as zookeeper password  unless explicitly specified -
[FABRIC-331] ZookeeperClusterServiceImpl will now import users when autostarting -
[ENTESB-425]a further fix
Revert [ENTESB-425]a further fix This reverts commit 2a5d351628132ece647b549678e234e341f35976 -
ENTESB-523 Reapply the patch of camel-fabric
add support for editing profile resource using profile-edit
[FABRIC-358] Config admin bridge keeps the placeholder as is  if resolution fails -
[FABRIC-351] Make sure that the jvmopts are added once when creating child containers -
[FABRIC-363] Set version will now properly set the profiles for containers created after the version -
Fix a typo -
[FABRIC-367] Add test case that checks rollback on containers created after a version upgrade -
[ENTESB-591] Make references to mbean server mandatory to allow unregistering mbeans -  Add gurads to check if mbean is registered before registering/unregistering -
Added geolocation
refactored the getSource() method into the base class of all logQuery implementations
fix up copyright in product visable files

commit_message: fixed get source index when running in osgi with insight-log
Fix possible exceptions when computing maven coordinates
Clean a bit metrics bundle shutdown
Synchronize access to the features service to avoid possible exceptions
[FABRIC-420] ChildContainer provider now pull features and repos from the default profile -
Move provisioning result strings into the fabric api
[FABRIC-428][FABRIC-433] Improve url handler to work with the container profile overlay -  Make sure that lastModified respects hierarchy -
Add means of detecting changes in the broker - xml -
Replace CreateContainerOptions with a map and use jackson to deserialize to the correct type for now
Return a map of failed container IDs and the reason rather than the full metadata object
Fix some additional substitution problems
avoid possible NPEs
ENTESB-170 - fix ambiguous profile-edit -f option
Add jolokia agent URL to system properties if the jolokia webapp is registered
encode/decode config files using base64
register the physical URL of the fabric-git master into config admin; so we can use config admin events to replicate this URL into various osgi services (such as a flavour of hawtio-git)
Temporary fix: Make sure war feature is installed before fabric-agent on child containers  so that the war url handler can be used by the DeploymentAgent -
Make TreeCache check arguments of refresh operation before submitted  so that errors are more easier to trace -
Improve container token generation to last one minute
Replace list with set in the TreeData to prevent duplicates of children -
Remove the cache from fabric feature service and use configuration tracking -
[FABRIC-461] Load feature repositories -
[kibana3] Add ability to fix colours for some labels
disable fabric camel tracer API until we migrate to 2 - 12 camel compliant version
Fix an IllegalStateException when retrieving metadata for the root container and a possible problem with the cache when reconnecting
allow the version id to be omitted  in which case the default version is used when looking for web app URLs for a profile
#25 Improve javadoc a bit

Ignore the / servlet as its the redirect to hawtio -

diff:
diff --git a/fabric/bisect-fabric.sh b/fabric/bisect-fabric.sh
new file mode 100755
index 00000000000..5ab15dae7b8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/fabric/bisect-fabric.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,23 @@
+#!/bin/sh
+# 
+# Usage
+#
+# cp fabric/bisect-fabric.sh bisect-fabric.sh
+# git bisect start [badrev] [goodrev]
+# git bisect run ./bisect-fabric.sh
+#
+# @author thomas.diesler@jboss.com
+# @since 15-Sep-2013
+
+mvn -pl fabric/fabric-aggregator -am -ff clean install | tee mvn.out
+
+killall java
+
+MVN_RESULT=`cat mvn.out | grep -o "BUILD SUCCESS\|BUILD FAILURE"`
+echo $MVN_RESULT
+
+if [ "$MVN_RESULT" = "BUILD SUCCESS" ]; then
+   exit 0
+else
+   exit 1
+fi

commit_message: Add a guard that prevents deletion of local branches  when remote branches could not be read -
Propagate exception during git servlet registration as a FabricException -
Pull in css  also create app in a directive so its easier to bind to a DOM element
initial spike of #107 to move the functionaity for creating profiles/containers/requirements into a helper method using a DTO which we can then share code between JMX operations and commands
deleting a profile should remove any requirements for the profile
#133: Ensure that close will wait for pending task to complete  before attempting to delete group node -
Change the name of the thread factory to ZooKeeperGroup (was PatchChildrenCache) to avoid possible confusion -
Add a JMX method so we can fetch multiple files from multiple profiles in one go
[FABRIC-535] Fix fabric/fabric-git-hawtio tests - Ignore failing tests
Simplifying multi group master elections -
improve #137 so we properly replace feature URLs used for creating child containers
allow profiles which extend a broker to participate in the MQ topology view; e - g -  so running jboss-fuse-full will appear in the fabric/mq/brokers tab now
Fix entries appearing in the ZooKeeperGroup cache out of order -

[FABRIC-568] Ensure that KarafContainerRegistration doesnt take ownership of any configuration PID -  Remove the war feature workaround on child containers -  Tune features so that http doesnt get dragged in when not needed -

commit_message: Make sure we pass on disabling of password encoding to spawned containers Conflicts: 	fabric/fabric-docker-provider/src/main/java/io/fabric8/docker/provider/DockerConstants - java
Use prefix to ensure we dont encode pw twice
Fix obfuscating of zookeeper password -  Conflicts: 	fabric/fabric-boot-commands/src/main/java/io/fabric8/boot/commands/CreateAction - java
[FABRIC-969] fabric:version-delete command does not work

fixes #1019 so that mvn fabric8:deploy -Dfabric8 - ignoreArtifact=false will not attempt to upload the maven build artifact; nor add it to the current project -  i - e -  so you can just create/update a profile using existing bundles/features/configuration files
Move ensemble created marker in the karaf - data folder -  Align zk password handling in BootstrapConfiguration with CreateAction -
#1119 dont use dots in tags which seems to break in docker 0 - 10
#1119 add the Java container environment variables into the created image; so it can start up without any configuration

#1119 add a configurable entry point into the generated java docker container and add better support of snapshot jar dependencies (so we avoid using the docker cache for those to avoid shipping stale jars)
#1119 update the provision list
#1119 show preparing UI feedback as we start containers; and avoid barfing if we delete containers which have no current running docker container instances
#1119 make it easy to configure the server type in the container provider
[Spring Boot] Added component scanner logging -
fix pax-web https detection The ConfigAdmin should not be used here as it does not yet contain the needed information -  Use the Container info instead -
#1195 set a more meaningful set of names for the processes if folks use the ps command on the CLI
#1195 ProcessControllerFactory reference should be optional and dynamic
#1195 sets the container type correctly when using processes or java containers
#1195 updates the provision list for java child containers
#1195 fix download of maven artefacts to the install directory and lots of FAB warnings when downloading java jars for the Java containers; its also lots faster now
#1195 switch the use of the DownloadManager to use the current containers overlay profile; so that the maven configuration is always setup properly
#1195 fix failing test
#1195 raise an error if theres no mainClass defined for java containers; ideally wed do this better and earlier!
[Spring Boot] AMQ now connects to Fabric is mq-fabric jar is detected -
Upgrade to maven-bundle-plugin 2 - 3 - 7 -  fab-osgi brings in some old maven jars which we should not use -  Also do not use deprecated maven api  which has been removed in maven 3 - 0 - x onwards -
Improved process test -

commit_message: [Java container] Refactored ProcessManagerController to improve its testability -
[Java container] Added extra logging -
Java container now caches jvmOptions in the etc/jvm - config (just install-jar does) -
Narrowed test package -
#1501 enable being able to delete java / process child containers via the hawtio console; they dont disappear from the ps command yet though
add an example of using aggregate-zip in a maven project to create a single aggregated zip of profiles we can use with #1555
rename the folder to dependencies which seems nicer and more descriptive than modules for the uploaded dependencies JSON
fixes #1585 - the new eip-dozer-quickstart wiki from #1574 should demonstrate this in action
fixes #1665 and fixes #1654 so that you can use fabric8 - ignore = true to ignore a maven project from being involved in a fabric8:deploy or fabric8:zip
better error handling if the creation of the java docker container fails
fabric8:zip should include project readme - md file
fixes #1721 so that we can use the REST API to overlay any configuration files from the profile into the docker container; such as to configure logging
#1728: Darn there was an issue have to aggregate at the end -  So we have to install the file ourself using install-file goal -
#1728: Better logic to detect last project to know when to generate the aggregated  - zip -  This now works when generating the entire fabric8 source code from root -
#1779: fabri8:zip should include type in bundle url for itself  so we war projects works -
fixed #1473
fixing aligning for issue1473
issue1473 - Added a few helper methods to work with strings and fixed profiles to display per line
issue1473 - fixes for container-list command issue1473
fixed #1801
#1770: fabric - profile-list - Should use a wider id column
[Docker API] Extracted Docker host finder -
[Docker provider] Added DockerFactory host resolving tests -
fix integration test when running against a clean repository with no snapshot repository  (we must now use locally built jars for this test; not rely on maven repos)
fixes overlay links
#1855: container-list shows blueprint/spring status in verbose mode  and the various URLs can be seen in container-info
FABRIC-1079 setting restart instructions as System property instead that as Runtime property
#1106: Added --force option to fabric:create so users need to specify that if they really want to re-create the fabric -
#1908 add an iconURL property to profiles to return the relative URI (from the Fabric8 REST API) of the icon for the profile
#1908 add a summaryMarkdown property to profiles so its easier to view the summary text of profiles (and provide a default value if there is not a Summary - md available but there is a ReadMe - md)
fixes #1924 and ensure we add an explict stopped provision state so we can differentiate stopped containers from containers that are in the process of provisioning themselves
/#1924 use debug logging if enabled

Fix memory retaining by clearing listeners in groups -  The group listeners usually contain references to the bundle using the group  and given zk watches are kept in memory  we need to remove those references -
ENTMQ-700 - NoNodeException can happen during the update when zk connection is unstable; we should ignore that as it can fail the whole update
[Spring Boot][Data REST client] Added save(iterable) method -
[Spring Boot][Data REST client] Improved API -

fixes #1933 so we can specify a webContextPath for a WAR deployment - and default to the artifact id
#1946: fabric-agent downloader should support inlined maven repo urls -
#1987 add a REST API for getting the fabric requirements and posting either them all or a single profiles requirements
validate that the profile IDs are all valid in the requirements before allowing them to be modified
#1987 only create profiles with dependencies when their dependencies are alive and successful (and not stopped)
[Process registry][MD] Added @Value process registry example -

avoid blocking on killing docker processes in case docker daemon isnt running which can block
Fix placeholder resolution for ${env:} as it was not using the environment variables being passed in as a first pass  always used System Environment Variables only
Add more info logging
Fixes #2126 NPE when activating KarafContainerRegistration
Sort profile log information
Revisit integration smoke JoinTest
#2061 lets try perform a complete end to end test on each archetype in turn; since it takes a long time ;)
#2144: Fixed profile-list command -  And upgraded groovy
another work around from regressions due to recent changes to profiles; deal more gracefully with being able to modify things
#2061 lets remove the old requirements after weve scaled down
#2061 ignore more failing archetype tests
allow the OSGi resolver on project deploy to be enabled/disabled (and disable for now by default as it seems to be breaking the archetypes)
#2143 pass through any child environment variables to the created docker containers (e - g -  to enable different profiles)
also kill java containers running fabric spring boot apps by default
the spring boot webmvc archetype test does seem to work afterall
#2061 fixed camel-cdi archetype

ZkDataStoreImpl now also logs the content of the change when receives events from the TreeCache -
#2237: Output karaf version we use now -

#2453: Make the welcome screen adapt to if we are connected to a fabric or not -
Archetype builder should skip if the dir has a  - skipimport marker file

#2532: The archetypes should not use hardcoded fabric8 - profile name  but allow end user to define the name -
#2545: archetypes should include default values out of the box for JAR versions -
